lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਅਤਿ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: har naam dhan niramal at apaaraa |
lines.english: The wealth of the Lord's Name is immaculate, and absolutely infinite.
O Nanak, obtains the Naam; his mind is pleased and appeased. ||4||1||
Dhanaasaree, Third Mehl:
The Word of the Guru's Shabad is over-flowing with treasure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਧਨ ਬਿਨੁ ਹੋਰ ਸਭ ਬਿਖੁ ਜਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: naam dhan bin hor sabh bikh jaan |
lines.english: Know that, except for the wealth of the Name, all other wealth is poison.
The egotistical people are burning in their attachment to Maya. ||1||
How rare is that Gurmukh who tastes the sublime essence of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਸਦਾ ਅਨੰਦੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਪੂਰੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tis sadaa anand hovai din raatee poorai bhaag paraapat hoe | rahaau |
lines.english: He is always in bliss, day and night; through perfect good destiny, he obtains the Name. ||Pause||
One who tastes it, becomes immaculate.
The Word of the Shabad is a lamp, illuminating the three worlds.
The immaculate Naam, the Name of the Lord, washes off the filth of ego.
True devotional worship brings lasting peace. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਸਦਾ ਹਰਖੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਕਦੇ ਸੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: tis sadaa harakh naahee kade sog |
lines.english: He is forever happy; he is never sad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਚਾਖਿਆ ਸੋ ਹਰਿ ਜਨੁ ਲੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: jin har ras chaakhiaa so har jan log |
lines.english: One who tastes the sublime essence of the Lord is the Lord's humble servant.
Without the True Guru, everyone dies, crying out in pain.
He himself is liberated, and he liberates others as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪੈ ਹਰਿ ਤੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har naam japai har te sukh paavai |3|
lines.english: He chants the Lord's Name, and through the Lord, he finds peace. ||3||
But meeting the True Guru, all thirst is quenched.
Night and day, they burn, and find no peace.
He cherishes and nurtures all beings and creatures.
O Nanak, through the Naam, one finds peace and tranquility. ||4||2||
Gather in and cherish forever the wealth of the Lord's Name, deep within;
Dhanaasaree, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਨੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur sevaa te har naam dhan paavai |
lines.english: Serving the Guru, one obtains the wealth of the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har kai naam rate liv laae |1|
lines.english: who are lovingly imbued with, and focused on the Lord's Name. ||1||
They alone obtain the treasure of Liberation,

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗੁ ਗੂੜਾ ਧਨ ਪਿਰ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: eihu har rang goorraa dhan pir hoe |
lines.english: This love for the Lord is like the love of the bride for her husband.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਪਰਗਾਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵੈ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: antar paragaas har naam dhiaavai | rahaau |
lines.english: He is illumined and enlightened within, and he meditates on the Lord's Name. ||Pause||
God ravishes and enjoys the soul-bride who is adorned with peace and tranquility.
Wandering away from the Primal Lord, the root of all, one wastes his life in vain. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਸਾਤਿ ਸਹਜ ਸੁਖੁ ਬਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: gur te saat sehaj sukh baanee |
lines.english: Tranquility, celestial peace, pleasure and the Word of His Bani come from the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: haumai vich prabh koe na paae |
lines.english: No one finds God through egotism.
True is that service, which leads one to merge in the Naam.
Blessed with the Word of the Shabad, he meditates forever on the Lord, the Beloved.
Through the True Name, glorious greatness is obtained. ||3||
If He casts His Glance of Grace, then we meet Him.
Through the Word of Gurbani, the Lord comes to dwell in the mind.
The Creator Himself abides throughout the ages.
Dhanaasaree, Third Mehl:
The world is polluted, and those in the world become polluted as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਚਿ ਰਤੇ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਆਪਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥੪॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak saach rate prabh aap milaae |4|3|
lines.english: O Nanak, God unites with Himself those who are imbued with Truth. ||4||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਚੋਟਾ ਖਾਇ ਅਪੁਨੀ ਪਤਿ ਖੋਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: manamukh chottaa khaae apunee pat khoee |1|
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh suffers punishment, and forfeits his honor. ||1||
In attachment to duality, it comes and goes.
This love of duality has ruined the entire world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸੈ ਪਤਿ ਊਤਮ ਹੋਇ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: antar naam vasai pat aootam hoe | rahaau |
lines.english: He enshrines the Naam, the Name of the Lord, within, and his state becomes exalted. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਤੇ ਜਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur sevaa te jan niramal hoe |
lines.english: Serving the Guru, one becomes immaculate.
The Gurmukhs are saved, taking to the Lord's Sanctuary.
Attuned to the Lord's Name, they commit themselves to devotional worship.
The Lord's humble servant performs devotional worship, and is blessed with greatness.
Attuned to Truth, he is absorbed in celestial peace. ||2||
Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, he comes to understand himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੇ ਕਾ ਗਾਹਕੁ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਕੋ ਜਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: saache kaa gaahak viralaa ko jaan |
lines.english: Know that one who purchases the True Name is very rare.
True is his capital, and true is his trade.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਧੰਨੁ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਜਿਸੁ ਨਾਮਿ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: so dhan purakh jis naam piaar |3|
lines.english: Blessed is that person, who loves the Naam. ||3||
They listen to the most sublime Word of His Bani, and the Word of His Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨਿ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਸਾਚੈ ਇਕਿ ਸਚਿ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: tin prabh saachai ik sach laae |
lines.english: God, the True Lord, has attached some to His True Name.
